text.title: Work Breakdown Structure Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure: ideate L1 → decompose → 100%-check → size → Dictionary → validate. Decision-gates between phases.

step.name: ideate-level-1
step.action: Run `wbs-decomposer` pass 1. Emit Level-1 deliverables only (noun phrases). Force all six overhead branches present.
step.decision-gate: If any of {PM, QA, Deployment, Documentation, Training, Transition} missing, re-prompt. Reject verb-named L1 nodes.

step.name: decompose
step.action: Run `wbs-decomposer` pass 2 PER branch (don't try one shot). Cap depth at 4. Sibling-depth must not differ by more than 1.

step.name: hundred-percent-check
step.action: Validate `weight_pct` sums to 100 (+/- 1%) per parent. If gap or overlap, identify the missing/duplicate scope and decompose again.
step.decision-gate: If sum < 99% or > 101% on any parent, fix before proceeding.

step.name: size-leaves
step.action: Estimate effort_hours per leaf. Split > 80; merge < 8. Validator runs `templates/wbs-validate.py`.

step.name: dictionary
step.action: Run `wbs-dictionary-writer` per leaf. Owner MUST come from register; UNRESOLVED if missing. AC observable + testable. Excluded scope explicit.
step.output: Dictionary array with one entry per leaf

step.name: validate-and-baseline
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-work-breakdown-structure.py --file wbs.json`. On pass, commit as baseline. Sponsor signs before downstream schedule + RACI work begins.
